summary: Full e2e testing of Doctor Appointment Reminder System. Backend: 6/6 pytest tests pass (auth, doctor/patient/appointment CRUD, filters, enrichment, invalid-ref rejection, cascade-cancel on doctor delete, dashboard stats, manual reminders run with mock SMS setting reminder_sent=true, sms-logs). Frontend: login -> dashboard with 4 stat cards -> run reminders -> doctor add/search/edit -> patient add with gender select (Female) -> appointment create with patient+doctor+date+time selects -> logout returning to /login. All critical flows working.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description/aria-describedby for Radix DialogContent. Add <DialogDescription> for a11y compliance.

action_items: (Optional a11y) Add DialogDescription to Add Doctor/Patient/Appointment dialogs to silence Radix warning
critical_code_review_comments: Cascade delete sets all related appointments to 'cancelled' regardless of past status (e.g., 'completed' appointments also become cancelled). Consider filtering to only scheduled appointments when cascading.
run_daily_reminders uses datetime.now() (server local TZ) for today_str while created_at uses UTC. Could cause off-by-one day drift if server TZ != admin TZ.
JWT_SECRET default left placeholder 'change-me-in-production-...'; ensure rotated for production.
Appointment list filter testids are 'appointments-*-filter' (plural) — keep naming consistent in docs.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed doctors/patients/appointments and cleaned them up. UI test created TEST_UI_Doc, TEST_UI_Pat and an appointment for today (not cleaned, harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth, all CRUD, filters, dashboard, cascade, mock SMS reminder. Filter testids on Appointments page use plural prefix 'appointments-' (e.g., appointments-status-filter). SMS is mocked via SMS_MODE=mock; status='mock_sent' counted as success.
